explanation: 此刻正在做的事，用现在进行时，主语复数，be动词用are。

text: At five forty-five, Ben and I often ______ (watch)TV.
meaning: 在五点四十五分，本和我经常看电视。
explanation: often是一般现在时标志，主语复数，动词用原形。

text: Look, the big owl ______ (fly) in the sky. It can't ______ (run).
meaning: 看，那只大猫头鹰正在天上飞。它不会跑。
explanation: Look是现在进行时标志；can't后接动词原形。

text: Tom and Sue usually ______ (have) meat and bones.
meaning: 汤姆和苏通常吃肉和骨头。
explanation: usually 是一般现在时标志，主语是复数，动词用原形。

text: John often ______ (play) football after school. He ______ (like) playing football with his friends.
meaning: 约翰经常放学后踢足球。他喜欢和朋友们踢足球。
explanation: often 是一般现在时标志，主语John、He都是第三人称单数，动词用三单形式。

text: I never ______ (go) to the park on rainy days, but Danny often ______ (go) there.
meaning: 下雨天我从不去公园，但丹尼经常去那里。
explanation: never、often 是一般现在时标志；I后用动词原形，Danny是三单，动词用三单。

text: Sometimes my shadow ______ (stay) behind me. Sometimes my shadow ______ (walk) in front of me.
meaning: 有时候我的影子待在我身后。有时候我的影子走在我前面。
explanation: sometimes 是一般现在时标志，shadow 是单数，动词用三单形式。

text: Danny can ______ (play) football. He likes ______ (play) football. He often ______ (play) football on Monday.
meaning: 丹尼会踢足球。他喜欢踢足球。他经常在周一踢足球。
explanation: can后接动词原形；like doing 固定搭配；often是一般现在时，主语三单用三单动词。

text: Grandpa always ______ (tell) us a story at night.
meaning: 爷爷总是在晚上给我们讲故事。
explanation: always 是一般现在时标志，Grandpa 是三单，动词用三单形式。

text: — How ______ (do) the banana ______ (feel)? — It’s smooth.
meaning: —这个香蕉摸起来怎么样？—它很光滑。
explanation: banana 是单数，一般现在时疑问句用助动词does，后面动词用原形。

text: — What food ______ (do) the tigers eat? — They eat meat.
meaning: —老虎吃什么食物？—它们吃肉。
explanation: tigers 是复数，一般现在时疑问句用助动词do。

text: We always like ______ (skate). Sally would like ______ (skate) with us.
meaning: 我们总是喜欢滑冰。萨莉想要和我们一起滑冰。
explanation: like doing 喜欢做某事；would like to do 想要做某事，均为固定搭配。

text: I like ______ (eat) plums. Would you like ______ (eat) with me?
meaning: 我喜欢吃李子。你想要和我一起吃吗？
explanation: like doing 喜欢做某事；would like to do 想要做某事，固定搭配。

text: Does Mark ______ (like) ______ (swim) in summer?
meaning: 马克喜欢在夏天游泳吗？
explanation: 助动词Does后接动词原形；like doing 固定搭配。

text: Do May and Jim ______ (like) ______ (skip)?
meaning: 梅和吉姆喜欢跳绳吗？
explanation: 助动词Do后接动词原形；like doing 固定搭配。

text: The sun ______ (rise) in the east and ______ (go) down in the west.
meaning: 太阳从东方升起，在西方落下。
explanation: 客观真理用一般现在时，the sun 是单数，动词用三单形式。

text: My mother can ______ (cook) well.
meaning: 我妈妈很会做饭。
explanation: can 后面接动词原形。

text: It's nine o'clock now. We ______ (have) an English class.
meaning: 现在九点了，我们正在上英语课。
explanation: It's ... o'clock now 是现在进行时标志，主语 we 是复数，be 动词用 are。

text: The cake ______ (smell) nice. It ______ (taste) yummy.
meaning: 这个蛋糕闻起来很香，尝起来很美味。
explanation: 一般现在时，主语都是单数，动词用三单形式。

text: Jerry, ______ (not make) a noise. Listen, Miss Tan ______ (talk) about the stars.
meaning: 杰瑞，不要吵闹。听，谭老师正在讲星星。
explanation: 否定祈使句用 don't + 动词原形；Listen 是现在进行时标志。

text: ______ (close) your eyes, children.
meaning: 孩子们，闭上眼睛。
explanation: 祈使句以动词原形开头，首字母大写。

text: Don't ______ (cut) the paper. Please ______ (draw) a zebra.
meaning: 不要剪纸，请画一匹斑马。
explanation: Don't 和 Please 后面都接动词原形。

text: — What can Peter ______ (do)? — He can ______ (paint). He often ______ (paint) in his spare time.
meaning: —彼得会做什么？—他会画画。他经常在空闲时间画画。
explanation: can 后接动词原形；often 是一般现在时，主语三单用三单动词。

text: Ben ______ (take) his dog to the park every week.
meaning: 本每周都带他的狗去公园。
explanation: every week 是一般现在时标志，Ben 是三单，动词用三单形式。

text: The sun ______ (rise) behind the mountain in the morning.
meaning: 早上太阳从山后升起。
explanation: 客观真理用一般现在时，the sun是单数，动词用三单形式。

text: Don't ______ (doze) on the bench, Mike.
meaning: 迈克，不要在长椅上打盹。
explanation: Don't后接动词原形，构成否定祈使句。

text: It's half past ten now. The children ______ (have) an English class.
meaning: 现在十点半了，孩子们正在上英语课。
explanation: now是现在进行时标志，主语children是复数，be动词用are。

text: My grandfather likes ______ (plant) flowers. He always ______ (water) flowers on the balcony.
meaning: 我爷爷喜欢种花。他总是在阳台上浇花。
explanation: like doing是固定搭配；always是一般现在时，主语三单用三单动词。

text: Peter can ______ (play) the drum very well.
meaning: 彼得鼓打得非常好。
explanation: can后接动词原形。

text: — Where is Sam? — He ______ (make) bed in the bedroom.
meaning: —山姆在哪里？—他正在卧室整理床铺。
explanation: Where is... 询问此刻位置，用现在进行时；he是单数，be动词用is。

text: ______ (not look) out of the window now. Please ______ (listen) to the teacher. He ______ (teach) us a new word.
meaning: 现在不要看向窗外。请听老师讲。他正在教我们新单词。
explanation: 否定祈使句用Don't+动词原形；please后接动词原形；now是现在进行时标志。

text: Jim can ______ (make) nice cakes. He ______ (make) some cupcakes every Saturday.
meaning: 吉姆会做美味的蛋糕。他每周六都做纸杯蛋糕。
explanation: can后接动词原形；every Saturday是一般现在时，he是三单，动词用三单形式。

text: The twin brothers would like to ______ (borrow) that book.
meaning: 双胞胎兄弟想要借那本书。
explanation: 固定搭配 would like to do sth. 想要做某事。

text: ______ ______ (not be) late for work.
meaning: 上班不要迟到。
explanation: 否定祈使句用 Don't + 动词原形。

text: Let's ______ (study) together tomorrow afternoon. Teach ______ (I) Chinese.
meaning: 我们明天下午一起学习吧。教我语文。
explanation: Let's 后接动词原形；teach 是动词，后接人称代词宾格 me。

text: — What are you ______ (do) now? — I'm learning ______ (cook).
meaning: —你现在正在做什么？—我正在学习做饭。
explanation: now 是现在进行时标志，be + doing；learn to do sth. 学习做某事。

text: The sun ______ (rise) behind the hill in the morning.
meaning: 早上太阳从山后升起。
explanation: 客观真理用一般现在时，the sun是单数，动词用三单形式。

text: Kitty's mother always ______ (wash) clothes in the morning.
meaning: 基蒂的妈妈总是在早上洗衣服。
explanation: always是一般现在时标志，主语是第三人称单数，动词用三单形式。

text: Please don't make a noise. The baby ______ (sleep) in the room.
meaning: 请不要吵闹，宝宝正在房间里睡觉。
explanation: 现在进行时，表示此刻正在发生的动作，主语单数，be动词用is。

text: — It's a quarter past two. ______ your cousin ______ (swim) in the pool? — No, it isn't.
meaning: —现在两点十五分。你的堂兄正在泳池游泳吗？—不，他没有。
explanation: 现在进行时一般疑问句，主语单数，be动词is提前，动词用-ing形式。

text: — What ______ the students ______ (do) at the moment? — They ______ (clean) the classroom.
meaning: —学生们此刻正在做什么？—他们正在打扫教室。
explanation: at the moment（此刻）是现在进行时的标志，主语students和they均为复数，be动词用are，动词用-ing形式。

text: Look! Jane ______ (draw) a picture.
meaning: 看！简正在画画。
explanation: Look是现在进行时标志，主语单数，be动词用is。

text: Mrs Li ______ (not like) cats at all.
meaning: 李夫人一点也不喜欢猫。
explanation: 一般现在时否定句，主语三单，用doesn't+动词原形。

text: Danny, ______ (not write). Please ______ (listen) to me.
meaning: 丹尼，不要写字。请听我说。
explanation: 否定祈使句用don't+动词原形；please后接动词原形。

text: Let's ______ (make) a musical instrument and play it.
meaning: 让我们做一个乐器并演奏它。
explanation: Let's 后面接动词原形。

text: The man can ______ (play) beautiful music. It ______ (sound) nice.
meaning: 这个男人能演奏美妙的音乐。它听起来很棒。
explanation: can 后接动词原形；一般现在时，it 是三单，动词用三单形式。

text: It's half past four. The baby ______ (sit) on the chair.
meaning: 现在四点半了，宝宝正坐在椅子上。
explanation: 此刻时间为现在进行时标志，主语单数，be动词用is。

text: Danny usually ______ (do) his homework before dinner, but now he ______ (chat) with his mother.
meaning: 丹尼通常晚饭前做作业，但现在他正在和妈妈聊天。
explanation: usually 是一般现在时，主语三单用三单动词；now 是现在进行时标志。

text: The boys want ______ (help) the old people.
meaning: 男孩们想要帮助老人。
explanation: 固定搭配 want to do sth. 想要做某事。

text: Peter always ______ (have) music shows in the hall.
meaning: 彼得总是在大厅举办音乐演出。
explanation: always是一般现在时标志，Peter是第三人称单数，动词用三单形式。

text: On Friday afternoon, Danny likes ______ (go) to the park with his friends.
meaning: 周五下午，丹尼喜欢和朋友们去公园。
explanation: 固定搭配 like doing sth. 喜欢做某事。

text: Sometimes I ______ (go) to the park with my family at weekends.
meaning: 周末我有时和家人去公园。
explanation: sometimes是一般现在时标志，主语I后用动词原形。

text: Every day I always ______ (drink) milk in the morning.
meaning: 我每天早上都喝牛奶。
explanation: every day、always是一般现在时标志，主语I后用动词原形。

text: — Where are you, Dad? — I ______ (wash) my hair in the bathroom.
meaning: —爸爸你在哪？—我正在浴室洗头。
explanation: 询问此刻位置，用现在进行时；主语I对应的be动词是am。

text: My father always ______ (cook) breakfast on Sunday morning. But today, he ______ (sleep) now. He is so tired.
meaning: 我爸爸总是在周日早上做早饭。但是今天，他现在正在睡觉。他太累了。
explanation: always是一般现在时标志，father是三单用cooks；now是现在进行时标志。

text: Tom never ______ (have) breakfast in the morning. He always ______ (get) up very late.
meaning: 汤姆早上从不吃早饭。他总是起得很晚。
explanation: never、always是一般现在时标志，Tom是三单，动词用三单形式。

text: Jim and his brother always ______ (play) football after school.
meaning: 吉姆和他哥哥总是放学后踢足球。
explanation: always是一般现在时标志，主语是复数，动词用原形。

text: She ______ (love) ______ (play) beach ball in summer. In winter, she usually ______ (read) books at home.
meaning: 她夏天喜欢玩沙滩球。冬天，她通常在家看书。
explanation: 一般现在时，she是三单；love doing为固定搭配；usually是一般现在时标志。

text: The Wangs ______ (have) a new dog. Look! They ______ it in the garden. (walk)
meaning: 王家有一只新狗。看！他们正在花园里遛它。
explanation: The Wangs是一家人，复数用have；Look是现在进行时标志。

text: ______ the Lis busy at weekends?
meaning: 李家一家人周末忙吗？
explanation: the Lis表示一家人，复数；be busy固定搭配，所以用Are。

text: It's ten thirty now. My mother ______ (cook) in the kitchen.
meaning: 现在是十点半，我的妈妈正在厨房做饭。
explanation: now 是现在进行时的标志，主语 my mother 是第三人称单数，be 动词用 is，cook 的现在分词形式是 cooking。

text: We ______ (swim) in the sea now.
meaning: 我们现在正在海里游泳。
explanation: now 是现在进行时的标志，主语 we 是复数，be 动词用 are，swim 的现在分词形式是 swimming。

text: Tom ______ (leave) home at seven thirty every day.
meaning: 汤姆每天七点半离开家。
explanation: every day 是一般现在时的标志，主语 Tom 是第三人称单数，动词 leave 用第三人称单数形式 leaves。

text: Sam ______ (chat) with his parents now.
meaning: 山姆现在正在和他的父母聊天。
explanation: now 是现在进行时的标志，主语 Sam 是第三人称单数，be 动词用 is，chat 的现在分词形式是 chatting。

text: My grandmother can ______ (make) beautiful dolls.
meaning: 我的奶奶会做漂亮的玩偶。
explanation: can 后接动词原形。

text: My sister always ______ (watch) cartoons on Sunday, but now she ______ (do) a puzzle with her friend.
meaning: 我妹妹周日总是看卡通片，但现在她正在和朋友玩拼图。
explanation: always 是一般现在时，主语三单用三单动词；now 是现在进行时标志。

text: ______ (not play) ball games, boys. It's too late.
meaning: 男孩们，不要玩球类游戏。太晚了。
explanation: 否定祈使句用 Don't + 动词原形，句首大写。

text: The little boy likes ______ (write) his name on the paper.
meaning: 小男孩喜欢在纸上写他的名字。
explanation: like doing sth. 固定搭配，表示长期爱好。

text: Kitty usually ______ (have) a meeting at six o'clock in the evening.
meaning: 基蒂通常在晚上六点开会。
explanation: usually 是一般现在时，主语三单，have 变为 has。

text: The Lins ______ having a holiday in Hong Kong.
meaning: 林一家人正在香港度假。
explanation: the Lins 表示一家人，为复数，be 动词用 are。

text: — Can I finish ______ the cartoon, Mum? — All right.
meaning: —妈妈，我能看完动画片吗？—好的。
explanation: finish doing sth. 固定搭配，finish 后接动名词。

text: — Who is ______ the music in the restaurant? — Ben is.
meaning: —谁正在餐厅里听音乐？—本。
explanation: 现在进行时 be doing；listen to music 是固定搭配。

text: — Can you ______? — Yes, we can.
meaning: —你们会打排球吗？—是的，我们会。
explanation: can 后接动词原形；球类运动前不加 the。

text: How ______ these lemons feel?
meaning: 这些柠檬摸起来怎么样？
explanation: 主语 these lemons 是复数，feel 是实义动词，疑问句用助动词 do。

text: Let's go ______ together.
meaning: 让我们一起去游泳吧。
explanation: 固定搭配 go swimming 表示去游泳。

text: Milly wants ______ the apples ______ the tree.
meaning: 米莉想要吃树上的苹果。
explanation: want to do sth. 想要做某事；长在树上用介词on。

text: — What food does a cat ______? — It ______ fish.
meaning: —猫吃什么食物？—它吃鱼。
explanation: 助动词does后接动词原形；主语it是三单，动词用三单形式。

text: The mouse ______ onto the door, then it ______ off the door.
meaning: 老鼠爬上了门，然后从门上跳了下来。
explanation: 主语mouse是三单，动词用三单形式；climb onto爬上，jump off跳下。

text: Tom likes ______ football. He'd like ______ the football club.
meaning: 汤姆喜欢踢足球。他想要加入足球俱乐部。
explanation: like doing sth.喜欢做某事；would like to do sth.想要做某事。

text: ______ want to join the tennis club.
meaning: 爱丽丝和我想要加入网球俱乐部。
explanation: 人称代词并列作主语时，顺序为第二人称→第三人称→第一人称，用主格形式。

text: My mother can cook very well. The carrots ______ nice.
meaning: 我妈妈做饭很好吃。胡萝卜闻起来很香。
explanation: 主语carrots是复数，动词用原形；smell表示闻起来。

text: I ______ a mouse. It is ______ the apple.
meaning: 我看见一只老鼠。它正在看苹果。
explanation: 第一空为一般现在时用see；第二空是现在进行时look at sth. 看某物。

text: ______ your father watch TV on Sunday?
meaning: 你爸爸周日看电视吗？
explanation: 主语your father是第三人称单数，实义动词watch变疑问句要用助动词Does。

text: I usually ______ with my brother at night, but now we ______ with our parents.
meaning: 我晚上通常和我哥哥看书，但现在我们正在和父母聊天。
explanation: usually是一般现在时，主语I后用动词原形；now是现在进行时，结构为be+doing。
difficulty: 一般现在时、现在进行时

text: — ______ Peter like playing volleyball? — No, he ______.
meaning: —彼得喜欢打排球吗？—不，他不喜欢。
explanation: 主语Peter是第三人称单数，疑问句用Does；否定回答用doesn't。

text: He ______ (eat) a hamburger now.
meaning: 他现在正在吃一个汉堡。
explanation: now是现在进行时标志，主语he为单数，be动词用is，eat变为eating。

text: The mouse sees the cat food. He wants ______ (eat) it.
meaning: 老鼠看见了猫粮，它想要吃掉它。
explanation: 固定搭配want to do sth. 想要做某事。

text: I want ______ (join) the badminton club.
meaning: 我想要加入羽毛球俱乐部。
explanation: 固定搭配want to do sth. 想要做某事。

text: He can ______ (skip) well. He is good at ______ (skip).
meaning: 他跳绳跳得很好，他擅长跳绳。
explanation: can后接动词原形；be good at后接动名词。

text: My brother can ______ (run) fast. Look! He ______ (run) on the playground.
meaning: 我的哥哥能跑得很快。看！他正在操场上跑步。
explanation: can后接动词原形；Look是现在进行时标志，主语he为单数。

text: — What food ______ the tiger ______ (eat)? — It ______ (eat) meat.
meaning: —老虎吃什么食物？—它吃肉。
explanation: 一般现在时特殊疑问句，主语三单用does+动词原形；答句动词用三单。

text: — ______ Ginger ______ (like) the bag? — Yes.
meaning: —金杰喜欢这个包吗？—是的。
explanation: 一般现在时一般疑问句，主语三单用Does+动词原形。

text: Mog ______ (not like) cat food. He ______ (like) fish.
meaning: 莫格不喜欢猫粮，他喜欢鱼。
explanation: 一般现在时，主语三单，否定用doesn't+动词原形，肯定动词用三单。

text: — Does Alice ______ (like) ______ (dance) at school? — Yes, she does.
meaning: —爱丽丝喜欢在学校跳舞吗？—是的。
explanation: 助动词后用动词原形；like doing sth.喜欢做某事。

text: Danny likes ______ (make) model ships at home.
meaning: 丹尼喜欢在家做轮船模型。
explanation: like doing sth. 喜欢做某事。

text: — Can you ______ (clean) the room now? — Yes, of course.
meaning: —你现在能打扫房间吗？—当然可以。
explanation: can后接动词原形。

text: — Would Mr Li like to ______ (play) with us? — Yes, he would ______ (like) to.
meaning: —李先生想要和我们一起玩吗？—是的，他愿意。

text: It's time ______ lunch.
meaning: 该吃午饭了。
explanation: 固定句型 It's time to do sth.，表示该做某事了，后接 to + 动词原形 have。

text: Can I finish ______ the cartoon, Mum?
meaning: 妈妈，我能看完这个动画片吗？
explanation: 固定搭配 finish doing sth.，finish 后接动名词 watching。

text: The wheels on the bike ______ round and round.
meaning: 自行车上的轮子一圈一圈地转。
explanation: 描述客观事实用一般现在时；the wheels 是复数主语，动词用原形 go。

text:
Tom does his homework at six.(改为否定句)
Tom ______ his homework at six.
meaning: Tom 六点不做作业。
explanation: 原句 does 是实义动词 do 的三单形式，改为否定句需加助动词 doesn't，后接动词原形 do。

text:
Mr Zhang can make an aeroplane.(改为现在进行时)
Mr Zhang ______ an aeroplane.
meaning: 张先生正在做飞机模型。
explanation: 改为现在进行时，结构 be + doing；Mr Zhang 是第三人称单数，be 动词用 is，make 去 e 加 ing。

text:
Ben washes his face at seven o'clock in the morning.(对划线部分提问)
______ Ben ______ at seven o'clock in the morning?
meaning: Ben 早上七点做什么？
explanation: 对动作划线提问用 What，Ben 是第三人称单数用 does 提问，后面动词用原形 do。

text: Mary can ______ (make) a model plane. Look! It ______ (fly) in the sky.
meaning: Mary 会做飞机模型。看！它正在天上飞。
explanation: can 后接动词原形 make；Look! 是现在进行时标志，It 是单数用 is，fly 变为 flying。

text: It's a sunny day. Let's ______ (go) to the beach for a holiday.
meaning: 天气晴朗，我们去海滩度假吧。
explanation: Let's 后接动词原形 go，Let's do sth. 是祈使句固定句型。

text:
— Where are the ______ (sheep)?
— They ______ (eat) ______ (grass) in the stable.
meaning: — 羊在哪里？— 它们正在马厩里吃草。
explanation: sheep 单复数同形，此处表复数不变化；Where are... 问当前动作用现在进行时 are eating；grass 不可数用原形。

text: On Mid-Autumn Day, my family usually ______ (visit) my grandparents and ______ (enjoy) the moon together.
meaning: 中秋节那天，我家通常看望祖父母并一起赏月。
explanation: usually 是一般现在时标志；my family 视作整体单数，visit 加 s，enjoy 加 s。

text: This pair of scissors ______ not dear.
meaning: 这把剪刀不贵。
explanation: this pair of... 以 pair 为核心主语，单数，be 动词用 is。

text:
— How ______ the toy car ______?
— It's hard.
meaning: — 这辆玩具车摸起来怎么样？— 很硬。
explanation: the toy car 是第三人称单数，特殊疑问句用 does 提问，后面 feel 用动词原形。

text: Betty usually watches TV after dinner, but now she ______ a book.
meaning: Betty 通常晚饭后看电视，但现在她正在看书。
explanation: now 是现在进行时标志，she 用 is；read a book 表示看书，look 不能直接接宾语表示看。

text:
My father is drying the dishes in the kitchen.(改为一般疑问句)
______ your father ______ the dishes in the kitchen?
meaning: 你的爸爸正在厨房擦盘子吗？
explanation: 现在进行时改一般疑问句，将 be 动词 Is 提前到句首，drying 保持不动。

text:
Peter is playing basketball with his friends now.(用 usually 替换 now)
Peter ______ basketball with his friends.
meaning: Peter 通常和朋友打篮球。
explanation: 用 usually 替换 now 后变为一般现在时，Peter 是单数，play 加 s 变为 plays。

text:
Danny is drawing pets in the living room.(对划线部分提问)
What ______ Danny ______ in the living room?
meaning: Danny 正在客厅做什么？
explanation: 现在进行时对动作提问用 What is...doing?，is 提前，drawing 换成 doing。

text:
Alice brushes her teeth after dinner every day.(对划线部分提问)
What ______ Alice ______ after dinner every day?
meaning: Alice 每天晚饭后做什么？
explanation: 一般现在时对动作提问用 What does...do?，Alice 三单用 does，后面用原形 do。

text:
Please be quiet.(改为否定句)
Please ______ quiet.
meaning: 请不要安静。
explanation: 祈使句否定形式用 Don't + 动词原形，be 动词原形不变，Please 后接 Don't be。

text: Their cousin ______ (have) a pair of ______ (sunglass).
meaning: 他们的表兄有一副太阳镜。
explanation: Their cousin 是第三人称单数，have 变 has；a pair of 后接可数名词复数 sunglasses。

text: It's six in the evening. The Lis ______ (have) dinner.
meaning: 现在是晚上六点，李家一家人正在吃晚饭。
explanation: It's six in the evening 表示此刻正在发生的事，用现在进行时；the Lis 是复数，be 动词用 are，have 变为 having。

text: Kitty often ______ (do) a puzzle at half past seven on Friday evening.
meaning: Kitty 经常在周五晚上七点半做拼图。
explanation: often 是一般现在时标志，Kitty 是第三人称单数，do 变为 does。

text: Hi, Ben. ______ you ______ (write) a letter to your friends now?
meaning: 嗨 Ben，你现在正在给朋友写信吗？
explanation: now 是现在进行时标志，you 用 Are，write 去 e 加 ing 变为 writing。

text:
— Where ______ (be) your mum?
— She ______ (chat) with grandma in the kitchen.
meaning: — 你妈妈在哪里？— 她正在厨房和奶奶聊天。
explanation: Where is... 问位置，your mum 是单数用 is；答句用现在进行时表示正在聊天，she 用 is chatting。

text: Look, the big owl ______ (fly) in the clouds.
meaning: 看，那只大猫头鹰正在云中飞翔。
explanation: Look 是现在进行时标志，the big owl 是单数，be 动词用 is，fly 变为 flying。

text: Danny's sister is doing ______ (she) homework in the bedroom. She wants ______ (finish) ______ (do) it before dinner.
meaning: Danny 的姐姐正在卧室做作业。她想在晚饭前做完。
explanation: she 变为物主代词 her 修饰 homework；want to do sth. 后接 to finish；finish doing sth. 后接 doing。

text: Simon ______ (watch) TV news every evening.
meaning: Simon 每天晚上看电视新闻。
explanation: every evening 是一般现在时标志，Simon 是第三人称单数，watch 以 ch 结尾加 es。

text: My little brother is ______ a puzzle.
meaning: 我的小弟弟正在做拼图。
explanation: 固定搭配 do a puzzle 表示做拼图；play 指玩运动或游戏，make 指制作，此处不适用。

text:
— Is John's father ______ (drink) some juice?
— Yes, he is.
meaning: ——约翰的爸爸在喝果汁吗？——是的，他在喝。
explanation: 前面有 Is，后面回答 Yes, he is，说明是现在进行时，结构为 is + 动词ing；drink 的现在分词是 drinking。

text: The pair of shoes ______ (be) nice.
meaning: 这双鞋很漂亮。
explanation: 主语 The pair of...（一双……）核心词是 pair，为单数，be 动词用 is；不要被 shoes 误导。

text: ______ the children ______ (draw) on the paper in the art class now?
meaning: 孩子们正在美术课上画画吗？
explanation: now 是现在进行时的标志词；children 是复数，助动词用 Are，draw 的现在分词是 drawing。

text:
— ______ you usually ______ (have) lunch at school?
— Yes.
meaning: ——你通常在学校吃午饭吗？——是的。
explanation: usually 是一般现在时的标志词；you 为第二人称，助动词用 Do；have 用原形。

text: He often ______ (play) with me after school.
meaning: 他经常放学后和我一起玩。
explanation: often 是一般现在时的标志词；主语 He 是第三人称单数，play 加 s 变 plays。

text: Be quiet. The little baby ______ (sleep).
meaning: 安静。小宝宝正在睡觉。
explanation: Be quiet. 暗示当前正在进行的动作，用现在进行时；the little baby 是单数，用 is sleeping。

text: Look! The old lady ______ on the beach.
meaning: 看！那位老太太正在沙滩上打盹。
explanation: Look! 是现在进行时的标志词；the old lady 是第三人称单数，结构为 is + 动词ing；doze 的现在分词去 e 加 ing 为 dozing。

text:
— Can your little brother ______ (run) fast?
— No.
meaning: ——你的小弟弟能跑得很快吗？——不能。
explanation: 情态动词 Can 后面接动词原形，所以 run 用原形。

text: My parents ______ (watch) TV in the living room now.
meaning: 我父母正在客厅看电视。
explanation: now 是现在进行时的标志词；parents 是复数主语，用 are watching。

text: I would like ______ (go) to the park this Saturday.
meaning: 这个星期六我想去公园。
explanation: would like to do 是固定搭配，表示「想做某事」，后面接动词不定式 to do；go 前加 to。

text: My father likes ______ (play) badminton.
meaning: 我父亲喜欢打羽毛球。
explanation: like doing 是固定搭配，表示「喜欢做某事」；play 的动名词形式是 playing。

text:
— Where ______ your teacher ______ (have) lunch every day?
— He ______ (have) lunch at school.
meaning: ——你老师每天在哪里吃午饭？——他在学校吃午饭。
explanation: every day 是一般现在时的标志词；第一句 where 特殊疑问句，主语 your teacher 是三单，用 does…have；回答中 He 是三单，have 变 has。

text:
— ______ you like to go to the park this afternoon?
— Sure.
meaning: ——今天下午你想去公园吗？——当然。
explanation: Would you like to do 是固定句型，表示委婉地邀请或询问意愿；Are you like 语法错误；Do you like to go 虽可用但此处 Would 更符合语境。

text: We ______ lunch in the restaurant at weekends.
meaning: 我们周末在餐厅吃午饭。
explanation: at weekends 是一般现在时标志；主语 We 是复数，动词用原形 have；has 用于三单；are 后不能直接接 lunch。

text: Mum, can I ______ some bread now?
meaning: 妈妈，我现在可以吃点面包吗？
explanation: 情态动词 can 后接动词原形；eat 用原形，eating 和 eats 都不能用于 can 后面。

text: Peter likes swimming but Danny ______.
meaning: Peter 喜欢游泳但 Danny 不喜欢。
explanation: 前句 likes 是实义动词三单形式；省略句中 Danny 也是三单，否定用 doesn't（= doesn't like swimming）；does 表肯定不符合句意，isn't 用于 be 动词否定。

text:
— Would you like ______ (go) to school with us?
— Sure.
meaning: ——你想和我们一起去上学吗？——当然。
explanation: would like to do 是固定搭配，表示「想做某事」，后面接动词不定式 to + 原形。

text: One of the ______ (child) ______ (be) very smart.
meaning: 其中一个孩子非常聪明。
explanation: one of the + 复数名词，child 的复数是 children；主语核心词是 One（单数），be 动词用 is。

text: Lily often ______ (do) some sports in the playground after school. But now she ______ (chat) with her classmates in the classroom.
meaning: Lily 经常放学后在操场做运动。但现在她正在教室和同学聊天。
explanation: often 是一般现在时标志，Lily 三单，do 变 does；now 是现在进行时标志，she 三单用 is，chat 双写 t 加 ing 为 chatting。

text:
— Do you want any ______ (cherry)?
— No, thank you. I want ______ (go) ______ (swim).
meaning: ——你想要樱桃吗？——不了，谢谢。我想去游泳。
explanation: any 后接复数名词，cherry 变 y 为 i 加 es 为 cherries；want to do 后接 to go；go swimming 是固定搭配，swim 双写 m 加 ing。

text:
— ______ Tom ______ (do) his homework now?
— Yes.
meaning: ——Tom 现在正在做作业吗？——是的。
explanation: now 是现在进行时标志词；Tom 是第三人称单数，用 Is；do 的现在分词是 doing。

text: Peter, please don't ______ (watch) TV now.
meaning: Peter，请现在不要看电视。
explanation: don't 开头的否定祈使句，后面接动词原形；虽然有 now 但祈使句不受时态影响，始终用原形。

text: It's ten o'clock. The children ______ (skip) in the playground.
meaning: 十点了。孩子们正在操场上跳绳。
explanation: It's ten o'clock 表示此刻时间，是现在进行时的标志；children 是复数，用 are；skip 双写 p 加 ing 为 skipping。

text:
— When ______ Tom ______ (get) up every morning?
— He always ______ (get) up at 6.
meaning: ——Tom 每天早上几点起床？——他总是在 6 点起床。
explanation: every morning 是一般现在时标志；特殊疑问句用 does + 主语 + 原形；回答中 He 三单，get 加 s 变 gets。

text: Listen, the bird ______ (sing). It can ______ (dance) well, too. Tom usually ______ (watch) it under the tree.
meaning: 听，小鸟在唱歌。它跳舞也跳得很好。Tom 经常在树下看它。
explanation: Listen 是现在进行时标志，the bird 单数用 is singing；can 是情态动词后接原形 dance；usually 是一般现在时，Tom 三单，watch 加 es 为 watches。

text: Peter wants ______ a model plane.
meaning: Peter 想做一架模型飞机。
explanation: want to do 是固定搭配，表示「想做某事」，后面接 to + 动词原形；making 和 make 均不符合此固定搭配。

text:
— How ______ (do) the banana ______ (feel)?
— It's smooth.
meaning: ——这根香蕉摸起来怎么样？——很光滑。
explanation: the banana 是第三人称单数，特殊疑问句用 does + 主语 + 动词原形 feel。

text: ______ (do) the little dogs ______ (like) bones?
meaning: 小狗们喜欢骨头吗？
explanation: the little dogs 是复数主语，一般疑问句用 Do + 主语 + 动词原形 like。

text:
— What does your brother ______ (see)?
— A flower.
meaning: ——你弟弟看到了什么？——一朵花。
explanation: does 是助动词，后面接动词原形；see 用原形即可。

text:
— Where is Teddy?
— He ______ (make) a model ship in his bedroom.
meaning: ——Teddy 在哪？——他正在卧室做模型船。
explanation: 问 Where is Teddy? 询问当前所在，回答描述此刻正在进行的动作，用现在进行时；He 单数用 is making。

text:
— What ______ Sally usually ______ (do) on Saturday?
— She usually ______ (watch) a movie with her brother.
meaning: ——Sally 周六通常做什么？——她通常和哥哥一起看电影。
explanation: usually 是一般现在时标志；Sally 三单用 does + 原形 do；回答中 She 三单，watch 加 es 变 watches。

text: Look at the children. They ______ (have) a picnic in the park.
meaning: 看那些孩子。他们正在公园里野餐。
explanation: Look at 是现在进行时的标志词；They 是复数，用 are；have 的现在分词去 e 加 ing 为 having。

text:
— ______ Ben ______ (go) to the library every week?
— Yes.
meaning: ——Ben 每周都去图书馆吗？——是的。
explanation: every week 是一般现在时标志；Ben 是第三人称单数，一般疑问句用 Does + 原形 go。

text: Mini ______ (have) two ______ (toy horse). She ______ (like) them very much. She ______ (sleep) with them every night.
meaning: Mini 有两个玩具马。她很喜欢它们。她每晚都和它们一起睡觉。
explanation: Mini 是三单，have 变 has；two 后接复数 toy horses；She 三单，like 变 likes，sleep 变 sleeps；every night 是一般现在时标志。

text: Listen! The baby ______.
meaning: 听！宝宝在说话。
explanation: Listen! 是现在进行时的标志词，表示正在发生的动作；the baby 是单数，用 is talking。

text:
— What animal ______ your sister ______ (like)?
— She likes ______ (cat).
meaning: ——你姐姐喜欢什么动物？——她喜欢猫。
explanation: your sister 是三单，特殊疑问句用 does + 原形 like；回答中 likes 后接复数名词 cats 表示种类。

text: Peter never ______ (play) baseball at school.
meaning: Peter 从不在学校打棒球。
explanation: never 是一般现在时标志；Peter 是第三人称单数，play 加 s 变 plays。

text:
— Would Danny like ______ (join) the tennis club?
— Let's ______ and ______ (ask) ______ (he).
meaning: ——Danny 想加入网球俱乐部吗？——咱们去问问他吧。
explanation: would like to do 固定搭配，join 前加 to；Let's 后接动词原形 ask；ask 后接宾格 him。

text: Look, Bob ______ (shake) the apple tree. The ______ (apple) are falling down.
meaning: 看，Bob 正在摇苹果树。苹果正在掉下来。
explanation: Look 是现在进行时标志，Bob 单数用 is shaking；The 后接复数 apples 表示苹果们。

text:
— ______ John like ______ (skip) a rope in the morning?
— Yes, it ______ (make) him healthy.
meaning: ——John 喜欢早上跳绳吗？——是的，这让他保持健康。
explanation: John 是三单，一般疑问句用 Does + like doing（固定搭配）；回答中 it 是三单，make 变 makes。

text: Don't ______ (be) afraid. They are not tigers. They are cats.
meaning: 别害怕。它们不是老虎。它们是猫。
explanation: Don't 开头的否定祈使句，后面接动词原形；be 的原形就是 be。

text: I want ______ (be) a doctor in the future.
meaning: 我将来想成为一名医生。
explanation: want to do 是固定搭配，表示「想做某事」；be 前加 to。

text:
— Can she ______ this book? She likes it very much.
— Sure.
meaning: ——她能要这本书吗？她很喜欢。——当然可以。
explanation: 情态动词 Can 后接动词原形；have 用原形，has 和 having 均不正确。

text:
— What ______ your father ______?
— He ______ coffee.
meaning: ——你父亲喜欢什么？——他喜欢咖啡。
explanation: your father 是三单，特殊疑问句用 does + 主语 + 原形 like；回答中 He 三单，like 变 likes。

text: There ______ (be) some coffee in the cup. It ______ (taste not) sweet.
meaning: 杯子里有些咖啡。它尝起来不甜。
explanation: coffee 是不可数名词，There be 用 is；It 是三单，否定用 doesn't + 原形 taste。

text:
— Can you ______ (make) a sandcastle with me?
— Great! I like ______ (make) it.
meaning: ——你能和我一起堆沙堡吗？——太好了！我喜欢堆沙堡。
explanation: Can 后接动词原形 make；like doing 是固定搭配，make 的动名词是 making。

text: This new pair of ______ (sock) ______ (be) from Mum.
meaning: 这双新袜子是妈妈给的。
explanation: pair of 后接复数名词 socks；主语核心词是 pair（单数），be 动词用 is。

text:
— How many ______ (mouse) ______ Danny ______ (see)?
— Only one.
meaning: ——Danny 看到了几只老鼠？——只有一只。
explanation: how many 后接复数名词，mouse 复数是 mice；Danny 三单，特殊疑问句用 does + 原形 see。

text: ______ (run) is fun. It ______ (make) ______ (we) healthy and strong.
meaning: 跑步很有趣。它让我们健康强壮。
explanation: 动词作主语用动名词 Running（大写首字母）；It 三单，make 变 makes；make 后接宾格 us。

text: There ______ any milk in the cup.
meaning: 杯子里没有任何牛奶。
explanation: any 用于否定句，there be 结构否定用 be + not；milk 不可数，用 isn't。

text: It's half past eleven now. Danny's brother ______ lunch in the restaurant.
meaning: 现在十一点半了。Danny 的哥哥正在餐厅吃午饭。
explanation: 现在进行时的标志：具体时间 now 表示此刻；Danny's brother 是单数，用 is having。

text: John enjoys the music. But Lucy ______.
meaning: John 喜欢这音乐，但 Lucy 不喜欢。
explanation: enjoys 是实义动词三单形式；Lucy 也是三单，否定省略用 doesn't（= doesn't enjoy）；don't 用于非三单，isn't 用于 be 动词否定。

text:
— What is the moth like?
— It ______ a butterfly.
meaning: ——飞蛾是什么样的？——它像蝴蝶。
explanation: 问句 What is...like? 问外貌/特征；回答用 is like 表示「像」；likes 是「喜欢」，like 是原形，均不符合语境。

text: Let's ______ (go) to the shop because I want ______ (buy) a new bag.
meaning: 咱们去商店吧，因为我想买一个新包。
explanation: Let's 后接动词原形 go；want to do 是固定搭配，buy 前加 to。

text: Some boys are ______ storybooks in the classroom.
meaning: 一些男孩正在教室里看故事书。
explanation: are 后接现在分词构成现在进行时；read 的现在分词是 reading。

text: Mark ______ a little car. He ______ it in his yard every day after school.
meaning: Mark 有一辆小汽车。他每天放学后在院子里骑它。
explanation: Mark 是三单，have 变 has；every day 是一般现在时标志，He 三单，ride 变 rides。

text: Here ______ (come) some girls riding on their bicycles.
meaning: 一些女孩骑着自行车过来了。
explanation: Here 开头的倒装句，主语 some girls 是复数，动词用原形 come；Here comes + 单数 / Here come + 复数。

text: Look, the classroom ______ (building) shadow is on the playground. It ______ (grow) long.
meaning: 看，教学楼的影子在操场上。它正在变长。
explanation: building 加 's 构成所有格修饰 shadow；Look 是现在进行时标志，It 单数用 is growing。

text: Let's ______ (go) to the beach and ______ (swim) in the sea.
meaning: 咱们去海滩在大海里游泳吧。
explanation: Let's 后接动词原形；go 和 swim 都用原形。

text: Henry runs away. The big black shape ______ him.
meaning: Henry 跑开了。那个巨大的黑影跟在他后面。
explanation: The big black shape 是第三人称单数，一般现在时中 follow 要加 s 变 follows。

text:
— How many ______ (knife) are there?
— There ______ (be) one.
meaning: ——有多少把刀？——有一把。
explanation: how many 后接复数名词，knife 变 f 为 v 加 es 为 knives；回答中 one 是单数，be 动词用 is。

text: Jill ______ (play) in the playground now.
meaning: Jill 现在正在操场上玩。
explanation: now 是现在进行时的标志词；Jill 是第三人称单数，用 is playing。

text: Here ______ (come) a man on an elephant.
meaning: 一个骑大象的男人过来了。
explanation: Here 开头的倒装句，主语 a man 是单数，动词用三单形式 comes；Here comes + 单数 / Here come + 复数。

text: I want ______ (buy) a new hat.
meaning: 我想买一顶新帽子。
explanation: want to do 是固定搭配，表示「想做某事」，buy 前加 to。

text: Look, there is ______ (horse) ______ (eat) the grass.
meaning: 看，有一匹马在吃草。
explanation: there is 后接 a horse（单数加冠词）；Look 是现在进行时标志，there is + 名词 + doing 表示「有……正在做……」，eat 用 eating。

text:
— Do you like ______ (butterfly)?
— Yes. They ______ (look) nice and cute.
meaning: ——你喜欢蝴蝶吗？——是的。它们看起来又漂亮又可爱。
explanation: like 后接复数名词表种类，butterfly 变 y 为 i 加 es 为 butterflies；They 是复数主语，look 用原形。

text: Here ______ an old lady.
meaning: 一位老太太过来了。
explanation: Here 开头的倒装句，主语 an old lady 是单数，动词用三单形式 comes。

meaning: Max 有什么？
explanation: Max 是三单，特殊疑问句用 does + 主语 + 动词原形 have。

text: Tom ______ (go) to school by bicycle.
meaning: Tom 骑自行车上学。
explanation: Tom 是第三人称单数，一般现在时中 go 加 es 变 goes。

text: His cousin ______ (not like) winter.
meaning: 他的表弟不喜欢冬天。
explanation: His cousin 是第三人称单数，一般现在时否定用 doesn't + 动词原形 like。

text: My parents ______ (be) on the beach now.
meaning: 我父母现在在海滩上。
explanation: parents 是复数主语，now 表示此刻状态，be 动词用 are。

text: The fox likes ______ (eat) grapes.
meaning: 狐狸喜欢吃葡萄。
explanation: like doing 是固定搭配，表示「喜欢做某事」；eat 的动名词是 eating。

text:
— Can your little brother ______ (run) fast?
— No. But he can ______ (swim) fast.
meaning: ——你的小弟弟能跑得很快吗？——不能。但他能游得很快。
explanation: 情态动词 Can 后接动词原形；run 和 swim 都用原形。
